## Summary

Describe what changed and why. Link the relevant issue when one exists.

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security or privacy hardening
- [ ] Refactoring or maintenance
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

List the commands, Python versions, and generated profiles used to validate this change.

```text

```

## Impact review

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated files.
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior, or the change is documentation-only.
- [ ] Template, profile, and plugin copies remain synchronized where behavior is duplicated.
- [ ] Service, library, and workspace impacts were considered.
- [ ] Security, secrets, permissions, and supply-chain impact were reviewed.
- [ ] Privacy, logging, telemetry, retention, and personal-data impact were reviewed.
- [ ] MCP trust, authentication, tool capabilities, prompt injection, and data egress were reviewed.
- [ ] Compatibility and migration impacts are documented when applicable.
- [ ] The complete relevant quality gates passed and evidence is listed above.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and `VALIDATION.md` were updated only when appropriate.
